description: You are a quantitative analyst. Construct a Global Minimum Variance Portfolio (Long-Only) for the four major European stock indices (DAX, SMI, CAC, FTSE) in the 'EuStockMarkets' dataset. Calculate annualized mean returns and the covariance matrix using daily log-returns and a 260-day trading year. The portfolio must be fully invested with no short selling. Save the analysis script to /home/ga/RProjects/portfolio_analysis.R. Export the optimal weights to /home/ga/RProjects/output/min_var_weights.csv and the annualized mean and volatility for each index to /home/ga/RProjects/output/returns_summary.csv. Generate a plot of the Efficient Frontier with the Minimum Variance portfolio highlighted at /home/ga/RProjects/output/efficient_frontier.png.
